reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
I had one of the worst hotel experiences at Softel Corniche Al Khobar, and I would never stay here again.

I booked and fully paid for 3 rooms in advance. However, at check-in, they only gave us 2 rooms at 2 PM, while the third room was delayed until 3:30 PM because it was “not ready.” I specifically asked them to send the key card once the room was prepared, but nobody informed us or brought the card. We only found out after going down to the front desk ourselves.

The coordination and communication at the front desk were extremely poor. One employee even tried to charge me again for the third room despite the fact that I had already paid the full amount during check-in.

What made things worse is that after all this delay, the room was still not clean or properly prepared.

Another major issue is that the hotel does not allow outside delivery orders to be brought to the rooms, which was very inconvenient.

On top of that, check-out is officially at 12 PM, yet they started calling us repeatedly from 11 AM and waking us up. When we requested luggage assistance at 12 PM, nobody came until 1 PM despite us calling multiple times and being told repeatedly, “Someone is coming.” At one point, we even called and the staff answered only to hang up the phone in our faces.

Overall, this was an awful experience with poor service, terrible organization, and unprofessional staff. Definitely not worth the stay, and I will never repeat this experience again.

reviews.negatives:
My recent experience with Sofitel Al Khobar Corniche has been deeply disappointing. I’ve always preferred Sofitel for its reputation of refined service, but this branch has proven to be an exception. The way customers are treated here feels careless, unprofessional, and far below the standards expected from a luxury hotel.

Despite submitting a complaint, I have not received any response so far — not even basic acknowledgment. This silence says more about the management than any review could. The staff appeared poorly trained, and the manager seemed disengaged and uninterested in resolving issues or ensuring guests’ comfort. It felt as though customer concerns were an inconvenience rather than a responsibility.

I genuinely expected better. This experience has damaged my trust in this hotel, and unless significant improvements are made in professionalism, communication, and customer care, I cannot recommend this branch to anyone

reviews.title: Unpleasant
reviews.positives:
I’d like to start by saying that the front desk staff were amazing — truly helpful and professional. However, the overall experience was disappointing. The reception area setup, the parking lot, the room’s cleanliness, and especially the price did not meet expectations.

Paying over 1200 SRA for a single room, I had higher hopes — perhaps a spotless bathroom, fresh and convertible bedsheets, or even the small touches like the classic toothbrushes I remember from my first visit in 2013. I also recall that when I requested ice, it arrived late and without a cover or proper packaging. There was no explanation given—no note telling me to retrieve it from the kettle—which I found unprofessional.

Sadly, it felt like a completely different hotel now, and not in a good way.

reviews.title: اسوا فندق للاسف
reviews.text:
اول يوم:- وصلت للفندق الساعة 7 مساءً مع ان حجزي بدأ من 2 الظهر وقالو انتظر بنعقم الغرفة وانتظرت 20 دقيقه تقريبا وانا جاي من السفر وتعبان.

ثاني يوم:- اتصلت على خدمة الغرف لتنظيف الغرفة وللاسف وصلو بعد 40 دقيقة تقريبا من اتصالي مرتين عليهم.

السلام عليكم                  وبعد
سكنت مرتين مره حجزت عن طريق استقبال الفندق واعطوني غرفه في الطابق السادس وكانت جيده من جميع النواحي

١- فرشة الغرفه لها رائحه 
٢- المناشف التي داخل مهتريه ( متقطعه مع الاطراف)
علماً ان كلا الغرف مطلع ع البحر وشامل الأفطار
والغرفة التي من موقع اقودا يجب ان تكون افضل من التي عن طريق استقبال الفندق لانها افخم واغلى

رابعا لايوجد أي تهوية أو شبابيك تنفتح بالغرفه
